title: Snowstorm Saturday
recap:
# Snowstorm Saturday

Power stayed on, snacks did not. We improvised with toast and still played six rounds.

- Poker table ended at 2:10 AM
- Darts final was decided on double 8
- New house rule: no chip splashing
highlights: Gabe hit a river straight to steal the pot.
Farah closed the darts leg from 54.
Brooke won three blackjack shoes in a row.

title: Hearts and Hustle
recap: Hearts dominated the night with rotating partners and loud score updates.
highlights: Noah shot the moon in round 4.
Priya corrected a scoring dispute instantly.
Ian and Olive forced a tiebreaker.

title: March Madness Mix
recap: We tested new game rotations and added The Game as a running side challenge.
highlights: Jules triggered The Game chain reaction.
Dana called exact Oh Heck bids twice.

title: Spring Showdown
recap: Poker and ping pong split the room all evening.
highlights: Ian won 11-2 in ping pong semifinal.
Maya captured the best photo set so far.

title: May Long Weekend Cup
recap: Outdoor setup with darts, ping pong, and lightning-fast card rounds.
highlights: Farah and Leo traded perfect darts checkouts.
Alex took final poker table with pocket queens.
